subject: thermal: thermal_of: Fix error return code of thermal_of_populate_bind_params()
notes: Probe-2 run (second retry after weekly-limit reset). Pipeline completed end-to-end.

Pattern is identical to err-1 (physmap_flash_remove) modulo variable name (ret vs err) and number of failure branches (2 here vs 1 there). Reused the err-1 predicate skeleton with two adaptations: (a) widened return-var name set to {ret, err, rc, error}; (b) dropped the `err = 0` initializer constraint because in this seed `ret` is not explicitly initialized to 0 — it's first assigned by of_property_read_u32, which may return 0 and leave ret==0 on entry to the failure-branch goto.

isFailureBranchGoto needed one refine iteration: initial body only matched stmt(0) of the then-block, missing failure branches where the goto follows a pr_err or assignment (this commit's `if (count <= 0) { pr_err; ret = -ENOENT; goto end; }` block-form). Fix: switched to BlockStmt.getAStmt() to allow the goto anywhere in the then-block. After fix, P2 fires on all 4 failure-branch gotos in each of _buggy and _fixed (8 rows total).
Stage-5 oracle: final.ql fires on _buggy lines 94 (!count goto) and 99 (!__tcbp goto), silent on _fixed. No fp_* variants in POC.
